---
title: "William Hay"
---

## William Hay

**Dates:** (1788-1876)

### Description

of Dunse Castle

### Biography

He was a connection of the Yonges, having married Mary Garstin (d. 1863), first cousin of Lord Seaton, Aunt Duke and Aunt Yonge. Their daughter Cordelia Hay married (1848) John Bargus Yonge (1821-1863), of Puslinch, Anne's brother, her second cousin.  Their daughter Mary (d. 1855) married, as his second wife, George Stirling-Horne-Drummond (1813-1876) of Blair Castle.

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
